Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-21-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED.
Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Answers To Post Judgment Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $336.30, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. (612/HEWLETT)
